subcodes.first_line: The foundations are firm and unshakeable, yet this Wronged One remaineth without helper or defender [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسباب اساسیست محکم و متین ولکن این مظلوم من غیر ناصر و معین بقلم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment
